data.name: Hentai Sayo
data.detailed_description:
💉 Hentai Sayo 是一款 情色拼圖遊戲，帶你進入神秘的病房，在那裡 一位粉髮、溫柔眼神的魅惑護士 正等待你的照顧… ❤️ 只有最勇敢的玩家才能揭開她的秘密，並沉醉於她的親密治療！ 🔥




✨ 遊戲特色：


  • 30 個刺激關卡 — 在冷冽的燈光下逐步揭示她的身體！
  • 30 個成就 — 欲望收藏家的完美選擇！
  • 畫廊 — 保存並欣賞你專屬護士的每一幅解鎖插圖！

🎚️ 難度等級：


  • 簡單 — 溫柔的檢查，讓她慢慢展露自己…
  • 普通 — 護士的挑逗關懷變得更加親密！
  • 困難 — 屈服於她禁忌的醫療儀式，一片一片地解開 😉

✨ 凝視她柔和的眼神，讓每一道拼圖都帶你更接近她隱藏、醉人的柔情。 👩‍⚕️🔥

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Hentai Sayo
data.detailed_description:
💉 Hentai Sayo is an erotic hentai puzzle game that takes you into a mysterious hospital ward, where a seductive pink-haired nurse with gentle eyes and a hidden passion is waiting for your care… ❤️ Only the bravest players will uncover her secrets and surrender to her intimate treatment! 🔥




✨ Game Features:


  • 30 exciting levels — reveal her curves step by step under the sterile light of the clinic!
  • 30 achievements — a perfect collection for those who crave desire!
  • Gallery — keep every unlocked illustration and admire your private nurse anytime!

🎚️ Difficulty Levels:


  • Easy — a gentle check-up, let her slowly expose herself…
  • Normal — the nurse’s playful care grows more intimate!
  • Hard — submit to her forbidden medical rituals, piece by piece 😉

✨ Look into her soft gaze and let every solved puzzle bring you closer to her hidden, intoxicating affection. 👩‍⚕️🔥
